rulings.Case Title: HEDANI, CHOY, SPALDING & SALVAGIONE, LLP VS. QING HONG LI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motion To Set Aside Default (And Default Judgment)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, April 26, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANT QING HONG LI Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment. Hearing required. Moving party to provide utility bill from 8/08 or other evidence indicating move to 951 Pacific Avenue residence. Further, moving party to provide declaration from Ms. Wu or other evidence explaining her relationship to the Jackson Street property. Lastly, moving party to provide proposed pleadings. =(302/AJR)
